title: Catching the joke
desc: Read dry irony and play along
setting: It's been raining for a week. A colleague comments dryly as you both look out the window at the downpour.

steps.speaker: Kolleg
steps.en: Glorious summer weather we're having today, eh.

options.es: Eba, ich han scho überleit, d'Badhose aazlege.
options.en: Right, I was already thinking of putting on my swimming trunks.
options.feedback: You caught the irony and topped it — dry humour returned in kind. Perfectly native.
You missed the wink — he meant the opposite. Play along with the joke.
Taking the irony literally lands flat — that was the whole gag.

steps.speaker: Kolleg
steps.es: Ha! Genau, und nochhär no schnäll go sünnele.
steps.en: Ha! Exactly, and then quickly off to sunbathe afterwards.

options.es: Klar, mit em Schirm als Sunneschutz.
options.en: Sure, with the umbrella as sun protection.
options.feedback: You're volleying the joke back and forth now — this is fluency at its most fun.
You've slipped out of the bit into earnest — stay in the playful register a beat longer.
Close, but questioning it breaks the game — just escalate the absurdity instead.

steps.speaker: Kolleg
steps.es: Du häsch de Schwiizer Humor langsam intus, scho.
steps.en: You're slowly getting the hang of Swiss humour, you know.

options.es: Mer git sich Müe, gäll. S'Wätter hilft ja täglich zum Übe.
options.en: One makes an effort, eh. The weather offers daily practice, after all.
options.feedback: Self-deprecating and dry in one breath — you've fully internalised the style.
Warm and genuine — a lovely way to receive the compliment.

options.en: You think? I don't notice it at all.
options.feedback: You clearly do — take the credit with a smile.

steps.speaker: Kolleg
steps.es: Chum, mir hole öis en Kafi und lueged em Räge zue.
steps.en: Come on, let's get a coffee and watch the rain.

options.es: Beschti Idee vom Tag. S'Käfeli rettet alls.
options.en: Best idea of the day. A little coffee saves everything.
options.feedback: Easy, warm, diminutive and all — you sound completely at home.

options.es: Gärn, bi sonem Wätter erscht rächt.
options.en: Gladly, in weather like this all the more.
options.feedback: Natural and good-humoured — a perfect close to the exchange.

options.es: Okay, aber denn zrugg a d'Arbet.
options.en: Okay, but then back to work.
options.feedback: A bit dutiful for the cosy mood — let the moment breathe.
